kirundi.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Manura indege ya Heavy canke Super
kirundi.maintain_90_efficiency_with_10_landing: Bandanya imikorere ya 90%+ hamwe no kugwa 10+
kirundi.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Yobora indege mu mutekano. Kemura ibibazo vy'igipimo. Menya neza imibare y'indege.
kirundi.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Uruja n'uruza ruke, intera nini — vyiza ku bagenzuzi bashasha.
kirundi.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Ikibuga c'indege nyaco — gukurikirana birakenewe, amakimbirane ashoboka.
kirundi.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Umutwaro munini — tegereza kwegera kutagezweho, igitutu ca lisansi.
kirundi.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Vyujuje — ubushobozi bw'abakozi/imihanda yo guhaguruka burengeje.
kirundi.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Imura za sliders eshanu z'ibikorwa. Hanura uburyo buri kimwe gikorana mbere yo gutangura igice. Nta manota, nta guhishura — wowe ubwawe usuzuma ukumva kwawe.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Iciyumviro cawe (ni iyihe nguhe utegereza ko izasenya ibikorwa mbere?)
kirundi.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: urugero, itandukaniro rito + igipimo kinini co kugaragara biteranya mbere y'uko umuyaga uba ngombwa...
kirundi.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Ni izihe sliders ebyiri zihujwe cane — uhanura umutwaro wo kongeramwo canke wo gukuba?
kirundi.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Ni hehe kuri buri murongo agace "gashobora gutozwa" karangirira naho "gakomeye" gatangurira?
kirundi.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Nimba umuyaga ugeze kuri 30kt, ni iryihe tandukaniro rito rigumana umutwaro uhamye?
kirundi.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Igihe c'icemezo cihuta caba gishobora kuziba itandukaniro rifunganye, canke gituma ibintu birushaho kuba bibi?
kirundi.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Nshobora gusigura —mu magambo yanje bwite— impamvu iyi nguhe ya sliders itanga uyu mutwaro.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho c'iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gutanga ibisubizo. Ubaka inyigisho yawe bwite.
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ukoresheje amagambo yoroshe ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi
kirundi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ku munyeshure w'umwaka wa 5, muri make kandi mu bucuti
kirundi.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: ku munyeshure w'amashure yisumbuye wiga precalculus canke fiziki
kirundi.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Fyonda "Sigura" kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro vy'ururimi rworoshe vy'iki ciyumviro ca ATC.
kirundi.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Igaragaza rya radar yo kugenzura uruja n'uruza rwo mu kirere. Koresha Tab guhindura indege, H ku cerekezo, R ku muhanda wo guhaguruka, C gutanga uruhusha rwo kwegera, Space guhagarika, I ku ncamake y'imimerere.
